    Conference Proceedings

    Exploring the Form and Function of Employment Subcentres in London, England

    Macdonald, Jacob L., and Pranjal Dave. (2022). "Exploring the Form and Function of Employment Subcentres in London, England." GISRUK Conference - Liverpool

    Local Data Spaces for Local Policy: Leveraging Trusted Research Environments for Granular and Secure Research in the Age of Covid-19

    Macdonald, Jacob L., Mark Green, Maurizio Gibin, Simon Leech, Alex Singleton, and Paul Longely. (2021). "Local Data Spaces for Local Policy: Leveraging Trusted Research Environments for Granular and Secure Research in the Age of Covid-19." Data for Policy Conference

    American Retail Centre Geographies: Centres, Characteristics & Catchments

    Ballantyne, Patrick, Alex Singleton, Les Dolega, and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2021). "American Retail Centre Geographies: Centres, Characteristics & Catchments" American Association of Geographers (AAG) Annual Meeting

    Urban Transport Initiatives and Pollution Patterns: Comparing Low Emission Zones and Metro Expansions via a Spatial-Temporal Difference-in-Difference

    Macdonald, Jacob L. (2020). "Urban Transport Initiatives and Pollution Patterns: Comparing Low Emission Zones and Metro Expansions via a Spatial-Temporal Difference-in-Difference." Monte Verita Conference on Sustainable Resource Use and Economic Dynamics (SURED)

    Neighbourhood Housing Price Dynamics of London, England: Clustering Spatio-Temporal Hotspots and Persistence

    Macdonald, Jacob L., Daniel Arribas-Bel, and Alex Singleton. (2020). "Neighbourhood Housing Price Dynamics of London, England: Clustering Spatio-Temporal Hotspots and Persistence." Urban Displacement Project and Urban Housing Lab Symposium on Neighborhood Change

    The Capitalization of Geohazard Risks on Residential Real Estate: Applications to Lisbon, Portugal

    Franco, Sofia F., and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2018). "The Capitalization of Geohazard Risks on Residential Real Estate: Applications to Lisbon, Portugal" VIII Conference of the Spanish-Portuguese Association of Natural Resource and Environment Economics

    Tree canopies, urban green amenities and the residential real estate market: Remote sensing and spatial hedonic applications to Lisbon, Portugal

    Franco, Sofia F., and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2016). "Tree canopies, urban green amenities and the residential real estate market: Remote sensing and spatial hedonic applications to Lisbon, Portugal" 11th Meeting of the Urban Economics Association
